title: Room Temperature Control Electronics
description: Explore the architecture and design of room temperature electronics that control quantum processors. Learn about the signal chain from classical computers to qubits, including DACs, ADCs, amplifiers, and the critical interface between classical and quantum domains.
learningObjectives: Describe the complete signal chain from classical computer to qubit
Explain the role and specifications of DACs and ADCs in quantum control
Analyze bandwidth, noise, and dynamic range requirements for quantum control
Understand the interface between room temperature and cryogenic systems
Evaluate commercial quantum control electronics systems
